headline: Hilton (HLT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Before we begin, I'd like to acknowledge all those impacted by the Middle East conflict, and I'd like to thank our team members who adapted very quickly and continue to provide extraordinary hospitality during this difficult time.  All of this, coupled with our asset-light fee-based business model, positions us to continue producing significant free cash flow and driving meaningful shareholder returns.  For the first quarter, System-wide RevPAR increased 3.6% year-over-year, driven by broad growth across all chain scales, brands and segments, as well as sequential monthly improvement throughout the quarter in the U.S.

headline: Hilton (NYSE:HLT) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Hotel company Hilton (NYSE:HLT) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 9% year on year to $2.94 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.01 per share was 1.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: How The Hilton (HLT) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Growth Initiatives
summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings is back in focus as the fair value anchor shifts from US$328.80 to US$340.75, giving you an updated reference point for where models now place the shares. This change sits within a flurry of Street activity, where several firms have lifted or fine tuned their Hilton price targets and at least one has trimmed its view to US$303 from US$306, highlighting a mix of optimism and caution. Read on to see how to track these moving targets and keep up with the evolving Hilton...
